title: Luteidiscus spathulatus
taxonomy: Luteidiscus spathulatus is classified within the family Apiaceae, which includes plants commonly known as carrots, parsley, and parsnips. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other species. Further, Luteidiscus spathulatus is a member of the genus Luteidiscus and is likely to be classified as a monocot, due to its possession of one cotyledon. However, a more precise classification would depend on further taxonomic research and analysis. Its classification is part of ongoing research in the field of botany.
